name: Cloud Ingest -> AI(SSE Fix) -> Feishu Bitable

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'gpt-5', temperature: 0.2, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: '你是新闻结构化助手。只输出严格JSON，不要markdown，不要多余文本。格式: {"items":[{"source_id":"","summary_cn":"","tags":"tag1,tag2","stance":"支持/反对/中立"}]}' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ items: (($node["Webhook Ingest"].json.body?.items || $node["Webhook Ingest"].json.items || []).slice(0, 80).map(i => ({ source_id: i.source_id, title: i.title, url: i.url, content: i.content_full || i.content_snippet || '' }))) }) } ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, inserted: $node['Build Bitable Records'].json.count, ai_preview: $node['Build Bitable Records'].json.ai_raw_preview, ts: new Date().toISOString() } }}
